# Full-Stack Engineer

## Overview
We are seeking a Full-Stack Engineer to build and maintain end-to-end features across backend services and frontend applications. You will collaborate with product and design to deliver high-quality user experiences.

## Responsibilities
- Develop REST APIs and backend services
- Build responsive web interfaces
- Integrate frontend with backend APIs
- Maintain quality through testing and code reviews
- Collaborate on architecture and technical decisions

## Requirements (Must-have)
- JavaScript/TypeScript
- React
- Python or Node.js
- REST APIs
- SQL (PostgreSQL or MySQL)

## Nice-to-have
- Docker
- CI/CD
- Redis
- GraphQL
- Cloud experience (AWS or Azure)

## Seniority
Mid

## Domain
fullstack
